stages.task: Speak with Micah in the catacombs.
stages.description: A child in the hidden catacombs keeps watching the dark lower hall.

stages.task: Search the deeper catacombs for Micah's blue ball.
stages.description: Micah lost his blue ball when Ruth kicked it down the hall. The children are not allowed past the survivor camp.

stages.task: Return the blue ball to Micah.
stages.description: You found the blue ball in the lower catacombs. Micah is waiting near the stair.
You returned Micah's blue ball. Micah gave you a Censure Entry Roll, and Joanna pressed a clean field dressing into your hand.

objectives.text: Find the blue ball deeper in the catacombs.
Return the blue ball to Micah.
